summary: Gaming website (Endless Arcade) with integrated advertisement placeholders: top sticky banner (below nav, 90px desktop/60px mobile), bottom sticky banner, interstitial ad after Game Over (5s auto-close), and rewarded ad system (5s countdown, 1 extra life, once per game). All ad slots commented for future AdSense/Adsterra integration.
architectural_notes: Endless Arcade game loop: play, crash, game over — ad triggers wired to these events
Ads must not overlap UI, block gameplay controls, or freeze the game
No random popups or ads during active gameplay

existing_features.title: Add a responsive top sticky banner ad container displayed below the existing navigation bar in RootLayout. On desktop it must be 90px tall and full width; on mobile it must be 60px tall and full width. Label it 'Ad Space' with a colored placeholder box. Include clear HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts later. The compact mobile nav must remain visible (not hidden) when this banner is shown.

Add a responsive bottom sticky banner ad container rendered in RootLayout. It must be full width, mobile-friendly, and sticky at the bottom of the viewport. It must not overlap or block any gameplay controls (e.g., on-screen buttons, canvas interactions). Label it 'Ad Space' with a colored placeholder box. Include clear HTML comments marking where to paste Google AdSense and Adsterra scripts later.

Implement an interstitial ad system that displays a full-screen overlay exclusively after a full Game Over event (not during mid-game crashes). The overlay must include a colored 'Ad Space' placeholder box, a close button (X) in the corner, and auto-close after 5 seconds with a visible countdown. After closing (manually or automatically), the user is returned to the main menu. Include comments marking where to replace the placeholder with a real ad script. This must be integrated with the existing Endless Runner and Highway Rush game pages (and any other game that has a Game Over state) without modifying immutable files.

Implement a rewarded ad system that appears after a player crash (not full Game Over). Show a button labeled 'Watch Ad to Continue' on the game over / crash screen. When the player clicks it, display a 5-second simulated countdown mimicking a video ad timer. After the countdown completes, grant the player 1 extra life and resume the game. This option may only be used once per game session. Include comments marking where to replace the placeholder countdown with a real rewarded ad SDK call.

Ensure all ad placeholder containers use simple colored boxes (e.g., semi-transparent dark with a neon accent border matching the site theme) with centered 'Ad Space' text. Ad containers must not overlap game UI, nav, or controls. The layout must be fully responsive and maintain smooth gameplay performance — ad rendering must not cause frame drops or freeze the game loop.

new_feature_requests.summary: Responsive top sticky banner ad (below nav, 90px desktop / 60px mobile, labeled 'Ad Space')
Bottom sticky banner ad (mobile-friendly, does not block gameplay controls)
Interstitial ad system: full-screen after Game Over only, 5s auto-close with X button, returns to main menu
Rewarded ad: 'Watch Ad to Continue' with 5s countdown, grants 1 extra life, usable once per game
Ad placeholders using colored boxes labeled 'Ad Space', clearly commented for AdSense/Adsterra integration
Compact mobile nav (visible but space-efficient, not hidden when top banner is shown)
